ShortDescription.SourceString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">The femme fatale that fortune favored.  Includes Outfit, Back Bling, Pickaxe, and Quests to earn up to 1,500 V-Bucks!</>

<text color="E8BA3BFF" fontface="black" size="16" Case="AllCaps">Reactive: Outfit and Back Bling become more gold with each elimination! Weapons Marigold picks up can turn to gold!</>

This pack contains:
ShortDescription.LocalizedString:
<text color="FFFFFFFF" fontface="black" size="20" Case="AllCaps">The femme fatale that fortune favored.  Includes Outfit, Back Bling, Pickaxe, and Quests to earn up to 1,500 V-Bucks!</>

<text color="E8BA3BFF" fontface="black" size="16" Case="AllCaps">Reactive: Outfit and Back Bling become more gold with each elimination! Weapons Marigold picks up can turn to gold!</>

This pack contains:

DisclaimerText.SourceString:
Quests can only be completed in Battle Royale & Zero Build matches. Access to these experiences may be limited by parental control content rating settings.

V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!
DisclaimerText.LocalizedString:
Quests can only be completed in Battle Royale & Zero Build matches. Access to these experiences may be limited by parental control content rating settings.

V-Bucks are in-game currency that can be spent in Fortnite. You can purchase new customization items in the Shop for Fortnite Battle Royale, LEGO® Fortnite, Fortnite Festival or Rocket Racing, as well as additional content like this season's Battle Pass!
